title: Implement PlayerState view API with type-safe get/set + hasState/clearState + error handling

reference_files.reason: Read/Write API - PlayerState has same signature as GunState, only ownership differs (Player vs ItemStack)
Error handling - zero values + WARN per-state per-minute for unregistered/type mismatch

acceptance_criteria: PlayerState class wraps Player and provides type-safe state access (same API signature as GunState)
All 14 typed get/set methods implemented: getInt/setInt, getLong/setLong, getDouble/setDouble, getFloat/setFloat, getBoolean/setBoolean, getString/setString, getUuid/setUuid
hasState(ResourceLocation) returns true if state key exists with non-default value
clearState(ResourceLocation) removes state key (restores to default value)
Unregistered state ID: get returns zero value, WARN logged per-state per-minute (reuses StateWarnLogger)
Type mismatch: returns zero value, WARN logged per-state per-minute
All set operations write through to PlayerStateData AttachmentType on the Player
PlayerState.getState(Player) static factory method returns PlayerState instance
Only states registered with domain=PLAYER are accessible (domain mismatch WARN)
No exceptions thrown for unregistered/mismatch (graceful degradation only)
